steps: No credentials are required for the free public API
Simply make requests to https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/ without any authentication headers
Optionally, sign up at https://www.coingecko.com/en/api to get a free Demo API key for higher rate limits
notes: The free tier is fully unauthenticated — no API key needed
Rate limit on the free public API is approximately 10-30 calls/minute
A free Demo API key is available after registration and raises limits to 30 calls/minute
Paid plans (Analyst, Lite, Pro, Enterprise) are available at https://www.coingecko.com/en/api/pricing for higher rate limits and additional endpoints
Demo API key is passed as x-cg-demo-api-key query param or header — not required for basic usage

test_endpoint.description: Check API server status — returns {"gecko_says": "(V3) To the Moon!"}
